zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret William Borthwick of Borthwick於大約1385年出生在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安波爾維其可時，她的父親William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick11383歲，母親Margaret de la Haye24歲。她於1402年與Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1464年6月5日在英國蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾武坡 堂 本 薩爾圖享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret William Borthwick of Borthwick于大约1385年出生在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安波爾維其可时，她的父亲William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick11383岁，母亲Margaret de la Haye24岁。她于1402年与Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1464年6月5日在英国苏格兰哈丁頓史爾武坡 堂 本 薩爾圖享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Borthwick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the old barony of Borthwick, formerly Loquhariot (Midlothian) and possibly also from Borthwick (Roxburghshire). The placenames are from Old English bord ‘board, table’ + wīc ‘outlying dairy farm’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret William Borthwick of Borthwick was born about 1385, in Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick, was 11383 and her mother, Margaret de la Haye, was 24. She married Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun in 1402, in Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 5 June 1464, in Upper Town of Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 80.

Elle a épousé Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun en 1402, à Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. ko.lifeSummary: Margaret William Borthwick of Borthwick(이)가 대략 1385년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 볼스윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick(은)는 11383세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de la Haye(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1402년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언에서 Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1464년 6월 5일 영국 스코틀랜드 하딩토실르 업퍼 타운 프 살토우에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret William Borthwick of Borthwick nasceu aproximadamente 1385, em Borthwick, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick, tinha 11383 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de la Haye, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun em 1402, em Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de junho de 1464, em Upper Town of Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 80 anos.

ru.Upper Town of Saltoun, , Haddingtonshire: уппир тоун оф салтоун, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret William Borthwick of Borthwick родилась около 1385 г. в местности бортвикк, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick было 11383 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de la Haye, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun в 1402 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 5 июня 1464 г. в местности уппир тоун оф салтоун, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret William Borthwick of Borthwick nació aproximadamente 1385, en Borthwick, Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick, tenía 11383 años y su mamá, Margaret de la Haye, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun en 1402, en Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 5 de junio de 1464, en Upper Town of Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 80 años.
